summary: Adjusted the opening to hook more cleanly into Chapter 10's threshold-of-exposure turn and tightened the exit so it hands off directly into Chapter 12's pre-dawn trauma-room preparation. No calibration-only example lines were present in the style bible to replace.
edits: Linked the first paragraph to the prior chapter's dirt-crossing-into-other-hands beat while preserving the original smell-and-liability logic.
Reworked the final paragraph to foreground the overnight prep items and Marisol's return to the trauma room before dawn.
